name: symphony-plus-plus-mcp
description: Opt-in Symphony++ MCP-backed WorkPackage and architect workflows for dedicated Codex sessions.

interface.shortDescription: Opt-in Symphony++ MCP orchestration for dedicated Codex sessions
interface.longDescription: Use this opt-in plugin only for dedicated Symphony++ architect or worker sessions that should connect to the local symphony_plus_plus HTTP MCP daemon. Start mix sympp.cockpit first; generic, review, and desktop cockpit sessions should use the default skill-only Symphony++ plugin instead.
